text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, after Curren Chan finishes training...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Wait up! Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why do I have to wait? I'm out here training on my own.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I know! ♪ That's why I wanna run with you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I would prefer to run alone... I'll be going now.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww... She's gone...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be roommates. Why is she
always like that?
choice_data_list: Don't give up. Go and try again!
Maybe you should try again some other time.
Maybe you should try again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be roommates. Why is she
always like that?
choice_data_list: Don't give up. Go and try again!
Maybe you should try again some other time.
Maybe you should try again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're right. I'll try one more time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What?! Why are you still following me? If you're
just trying to play around, then—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm not playing around.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You may not care about me... I may be just a
roommate to you, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna try running with you. I thought that
maybe if I chase after you, I could see the world
differently.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ehehe. I guess this must be a lot to hear all of a
sudden.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I am just a bother.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I never said that. Do whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay! I will! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Curren Chan and Admire Vega run
together until the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I guess people's moods depend on the day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Maybe some other time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night, in the dorm...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? The lights are still on...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Welcome home!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I thought I'd wait up for you since we
have the day off tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you worked hard today. I hope we
can talk tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Thud!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What's with you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Falling asleep without a blanket... Unbelievable.
You'll catch a cold.
